live_fixes: Added 7 × 301 redirects for broken footer URLs (privacy, copywriting, SEO, 2 case-study, Hebrew + percent-encoded variants).

Replaced 14 occurrences of broken image files (placeholder-*, עיצוב-ללא-שם-45.png, etc.) with known-good assets in active templates and pages.

requires_admin_for_perfect: Yoast title template change (Posts): set SEO title to "%%title%%" to retire the ~22-char trailing "| category | brand" and instantly fix 41 long titles.
